synopsis: The first ongoing comic series set in the *Star Wars* galaxy, running from 1977 to 1986 across 107 issues plus three annuals. Issues 1-6 adapt the events of *A New Hope*, and issues 39-44 adapt *The Empire Strikes Back*; the *Return of the Jedi* adaptation was published as a separate four-issue miniseries outside the regular run. Between the film adaptations, the series told original adventures of Luke Skywalker, Han Solo, Princess Leia, Chewbacca, and the droids as the Rebel Alliance carried on its war against the Galactic Empire. Many issues also included a reader letter column titled *Star-Words*.
title: Star Wars (1977)
